use_cases: Creating winter-themed landing pages with ambient snowfall effects
Adding festive holiday atmosphere to e-commerce product pages during winter sales
Enhancing event websites with seasonal decorative animations
Building atmospheric hero sections for entertainment or media sites
Adding visual depth to creative portfolios with seasonal themes
ai_summary: A lightweight snowfall particle animation component that renders customizable animated snowflake effects using CSS keyframe animations. Supports configurable particle count, color, size range, opacity range, animation speed, and optional wind drift effect. Perfect for creating atmospheric winter-themed backgrounds without heavy dependencies.
